title: Yen Aala Paakka Poren Lyrics Kayal Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Kayal Yen Aala Paakka Poren Song Lyrics
Singer: Shreya Goshal, Singer:K.G.Ranjith
Lyrics: Yugabharathi

Yen aala paakka poren
paaththu seidhi pesaporaen

avan kannukulla
enna vaikka poraen.
avan nenjukulla
enna thaikka poraen.

Yen aala paakka poren
paaththu seidhi pesaporaen

Veetta vittu
vandhaenu solla poraen.
Koottikittu poyidunu
solla poraen.

Yen aala paakka poren
paaththu seidhi pesaporaen

Pudhusaa pulugaama
romba perusaa valiyaama
adi eppa nee enakku
ponjaadhiyaa aagapoguranu
appaaviyaa
naaney ..
kaettu ..
varaporae...

Yen aala paakka poren
paaththu seidhi pesaporaen

avan kannukulla
enna vaikka poraen.
avan nenjukulla
enna thaikka poraen.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses deep emotions of love and longing, capturing the feelings of wanting to connect with a loved one.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Kayal, this song plays during a pivotal moment that highlights the romantic relationship between the lead characters.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the talented voices of K.G.Ranjith and Shreya Goshal.

Who wrote the lyrics for this song?

The lyrics were penned by Yugabharathi, known for his poetic expressions in Tamil cinema.

When was this song released?

This song was released on November 13, 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Yen Aala Paakka Poren, the characters express their deep feelings for each other through a heartfelt melody. The song's soothing rhythm and romantic lyrics create an atmosphere of longing and affection. It beautifully conveys the emotions of love, making it a perfect fit for moments of romance in the film Kayal. The collaboration between K.G.Ranjith and Shreya Goshal adds a unique charm, enhancing the overall experience for the listeners.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Yen Aala Paakka Poren from Kayal is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With the enchanting voices of K.G.Ranjith and Shreya Goshal, this song takes listeners on an emotional journey. The heartfelt lyrics by Yugabharathi add depth to this romantic melody, making it a must-listen for all music lovers.
stanzaMeanings: I am going to see what is happening and talk about it.
What will he keep in his eyes? What will he hide in his heart?
I am going to see what is happening and talk about it.
I will say that I have left home. I will say that I have gone with friends.
This is why I have been lying down, saving my life.
He will not be satisfied with just words; he will be lost in love. That's why... I am crying....
I am going to see what is happening and talk about it.
I will say that you are sleeping. I will say that food and water are mixed together.
Without being too loud, I will say that you are going to become mine, oh poor me... I will come...
I am going to see what is happening and talk about it.
What will he keep in his eyes? What will he hide in his heart?
